arts.sum: Udinese are on the hunt for a second consecutive win, while Napoli want to put their home defeat to Lazio behind them Antonio Conte is unbeaten in 11 Serie A games as a manager against Udinese(W9 D2) and among the teams he has met at least 10 times in the competition, the Bianconeri are the opponent against which he has his best win rate (82%).
